ticket.description:
Hi Rahen, 
Thanks for sharing the details. 

Hi Ankit, 
As discussed over the call, I’m happy to schedule a meeting tomorrow at 4 PM to initiate the Shopify integration. 

Please find the meeting invite attached. I look forward to our call.

￼
Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn <https://www.linkedin.com/company/Pluginhive>

Please find the meeting invite attached. I look forward to our call.
